title: NIO Stock: Analyst Raises Price Target Following Earnings Miss
text: Analyst response to NIO earnings varies based on expectations versus actual results. When NIO misses revenue estimates or guidance, stock typically experiences downward pressure. However, EPS beats or margins exceeding expectations can offset revenue misses. Recent analyst upgrades and price target increases tied to profitability progress and delivery beat guidance. Market reaction often focuses more on guidance and forward outlook than historical quarterly results. Macquarie analyst Eugene Hsiao upgraded NIO from Neutral to Outperform with $6.60 price target, expecting ONVO L60 sales meaningful in Q4 citing importance for investor conviction. JPMorgan analysts offered caution, lowering rating to Underweight with 40% price target cut to $5, roughly 14% below certain price levels. Analyst sentiment remains divided between growth opportunity narrative and profitability execution concerns.
